prompt: A stylish anime-inspired lo-fi music visual showing 3 teenage schoolboys walking outdoors on a quiet suburban Japanese street in late afternoon, arranged side by side across the frame with slight pose variation. Each boy has messy short black hair, a faceless dark silhouette treatment with a soft rectangular blur over the face area, white wired earphones, a white long-sleeve school shirt, black trousers, and a black backpack with visible shoulder straps. The left boy faces left in side profile, the center boy faces slightly left with his torso angled forward, and the right boy faces right in side profile, creating a mirrored triptych composition. Place a bold futuristic black UI banner across the center foreground with glowing edge accents and the text now p|yaing in lowercase white techno typography, intentionally misspelled. Set the scene on a Japanese residential road with utility poles, dense overhead power lines, sidewalk railings, low buildings, trees, and a vertical school-zone style sign on the left that reads 下校中. Use a flat graphic cel-shaded aesthetic with strong black silhouettes, pale sky blue, muted teal, cream, and warm orange accents, including an orange sun in the upper left. Add small decorative graphic elements for a music-player poster feel: dotted grids in 3 places, tiny square markers, short horizontal bars, angular scribble strokes, and minimal HUD-like corner accents. The mood is cool, urban, reflective, and trendy, like cover art for a lo-fi playlist or now-playing social media post.
